blogs.title: REST API Fundamentals
blogs.description: Master REST API fundamentals: HTTP methods, status codes, resource design, and RESTful principles for building production-grade APIs
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: HATEOAS and Hypermedia APIs
blogs.description: Implement HATEOAS in REST APIs: hypermedia links, discoverability, Spring HATEOAS implementation, and consumer-driven contracts
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Standardized Error Handling (RFC 7807)
blogs.description: Implement RFC 7807 Problem Details for error responses: structured errors, Spring ErrorAttributes, and consistent API error handling
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Content Negotiation and Media Types
blogs.description: Master content negotiation in REST APIs: media types, Accept headers, custom serialization, and versioning through content types
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
